description:
Set up a deniable encrypted archive for your organization's sensitive investigation files. Create a hidden VeraCrypt volume container at /home/ga/Volumes/corporate_archive.hc (100 MB total) with the following specifications:

Outer (decoy) volume: Encryption: AES-Twofish-Serpent (cascade), Hash: SHA-512, Password: 'AuditReady2024!', Filesystem: FAT.

Hidden volume: Size: 40 MB, Encryption: Serpent, Hash: Whirlpool, Password: 'InvestigationX!99', Keyfile: generate a VeraCrypt random keyfile and save it at /home/ga/Keyfiles/investigation.key, Filesystem: FAT.

After creation, populate both compartments: copy all files from /home/ga/Documents/decoy_files/ into the outer volume, and all files from /home/ga/Documents/sensitive_files/ into the hidden volume. Verify the archive works by mounting each compartment to /home/ga/MountPoints/slot1 and confirming file access, then dismounting. Write a verification report at /home/ga/Documents/archive_setup_report.txt listing file names and SHA-256 hashes for both compartments. Ensure all volumes are dismounted when finished.
